response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Song lyrics phonetically match the provided reference. 2. JSON Usage: Reference utilized for the musical performance; manual transcription applied for the banter segment starting at 04:27. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are timed to vocal activation. Aggressive end-time truncation and instantaneous transitions are used for rapid song lyrics and banter to prevent cascading delays.

subtitles.original: Walking an empty road
Nowhere for me to go
Lost and lonely
Yeah it's only me
Burnt out like candle light
Left blazing through the night
Melting slowly
Until nothing else is left of me
subtitles.english: Until nothing else is left of me

subtitles.original: Colored in shades of grey
Watching the days pass in front of me

subtitles.original: Longing to find a way
I can fly away
I'm drifting through this blue, blue world

subtitles.original: It's always been clear to me
subtitles.english: It's always been clear to me

subtitles.original: How cruel the world can be
subtitles.english: How cruel the world can be

subtitles.original: My shadow's the only one beside me
subtitles.english: My shadow's the only one beside me

subtitles.original: No love to call my own

Watching the years pass in front of me

subtitles.original: Wow, beautiful Nerissa! You're so great!
subtitles.english: Wow, beautiful Nerissa! You're so great!

subtitles.original: Ah! Thank you for coming!
Thank you for having me!
After that emotional song, now we're all energetic!
subtitles.english: After that emotional song, now we're all energetic!

subtitles.original: Oh my god, hi everybody!
Hey! High-energy everyone!
Thank you, thank you, it is my birthday!
subtitles.english: Thank you, thank you, it is my birthday!

subtitles.original: But who is this lovely lady I'm singing with right now?
subtitles.english: But who is this lovely lady I'm singing with right now?

subtitles.original: Who could I be? Hi darlings!
subtitles.english: Who could I be? Hi darlings!

subtitles.original: This is Hololive English Advent's devilish diva,
